---
title: ""
format: 
  html:
    title-block-style: none
---

::: {.hero}
# Dayton Data Challenge

::: {.subtitle}
Transform Data into Insight
:::

A week-long undergraduate data competition where students work in teams, analyze real-world data, develop their own research questions, and present insights to judges.

[Register Soon](#){.btn-ddc .btn-primary-ddc} [Learn More](about.qmd){.btn-ddc .btn-secondary-ddc}
:::

## About the Challenge

The Dayton Data Challenge is a week-long data competition at the University of Dayton. Students work in teams of 2–4, analyze real-world datasets, develop their own research questions, and present their insights to judges.

## Why Participate?

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.info-card}
### Real-World Experience
Work with authentic datasets and practice turning data into decisions.
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Team-Based Learning
Collaborate with students from different majors and experience levels.
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Professional Communication
Present insights clearly to faculty, industry professionals, and judges.
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Resume Building
Earn experience, recognition, and a certificate of participation.
:::
:::

## Quick Facts

::: {.facts-grid}

::: {.fact-card}
### Open To
All undergraduate students
:::

::: {.fact-card}
### Team Size
2–4 students
:::

::: {.fact-card}
### Registration
Opens August 28
:::

::: {.fact-card}
### Competition Week
November 2–7，2026
:::

:::

## Event Snapshot

::: {.timeline-item}
### August 28, Friday
Registration opens
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
### October 16, Friday
Registration Closes
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
### November 2, Monday, 6 PM
Kickoff and dataset introduction
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
### November 3-6, Tuesday–Friday
Team analysis and office hours
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
### November 6, Friday, 11 PM
Write-up due, maximum 2 pages
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
### November 7, Saturday, 10 AM
Presentations and judging
:::

## Sponsors and Partners

Sponsor information will be announced soon.
